meaning: n.隆隆声,响亮的钟声,很响的铃声vt.使大声鸣响vi.隆隆地响
examples: I heard a peal of laughter.
A peal of bells rang out.
The bells of the city began to peal out.
Ravens strut and croak on the medieval ramparts, and a faint peal of bells echoes from the church.
Some PCs are decorated with peal and stick labels or traditional paint jobs that produce inconsistent and expensive results.
